name: ampersand-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for the [&] Protocol ecosystem — continual learning, spec-driven development, knowledge graphs, and autonomous agent tooling

plugins.name: graphonomous
plugins.description: Continual learning engine v0.3.2 — 28 MCP tools for persistent knowledge graph memory with belief revision, intentional forgetting, epistemic frontier, goal management, attention engine, and topology-aware κ-routing. GraphMemBench: 120/120 across 15 categories.

plugins.name: ampersand-protocol
plugins.description: [&] Protocol toolkit — validate .ampersand.json specs, generate schemas, inspect protocol graphs, and work with the Elixir reference implementation.

plugins.name: spec-driven-dev
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow — read project specs, generate implementation plans, track spec coverage, and ensure code matches spec intent across the [&] portfolio.

plugins.name: prism
plugins.description: PRISM v0.1.0 — Self-Improving Continual Learning Evaluation Engine (OS-009). 6 MCP machine tools for diagnostic benchmarking of AI agent memory systems across 9 CL dimensions with 3-layer judging, IRT calibration, and actionable diagnostics.
